sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102211" key="ta/laina" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τάλαινα</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τάλας</foreign>; whence <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">66</biblScope> </bibl> invents a masc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τάλαινος</foreign>.</entryFree>
